expectations.text: Provides a numbered layer naming scheme specific to the user's icon (gradient background, main shape, text label)
States that the gradient background should NOT be exported — it should be set directly in Icon Composer
expectations.evidence: response.md: 'Your gradient background is the one element you skip exporting entirely — just recreate it as a background gradient in Icon Composer's Inspector'

expectations.text: States the canvas mask (rounded rectangle) should NOT be exported
expectations.evidence: response.md checklist: 'Do not export the rounded-rect mask — the system applies it automatically'

expectations.text: Mentions converting the text layer to outlines before exporting (because SVG doesn't preserve fonts)
expectations.evidence: response.md: '03-text-label ← your text — convert to outlines first → export as SVG'

expectations.text: Recommends SVG format for vector shapes (the main shape and text outlines)
expectations.evidence: response.md recommends SVG for main-shape and text-label (after outline conversion)

expectations.text: Includes a structured export checklist (a list of checkboxes or enumerated steps)
expectations.evidence: response.md contains a full markdown checklist with [ ] checkboxes
